steps: Turn off UV lights and clean hood with 70% ethanol

Clean items with 70% ethanol and bring into hood a. Sterile Filtered Media with PenStrep DMEM, high glucose, pyruvate Thermo Fisher Catalog #11995073 Penicillin-Streptomycin Gibco - Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #15140122 Fetal Bovine Serum VWR International (Avantor) Catalog #97068-091
Add 20 mls 20 mL of media with penstrep to T75 flask
Add 2 mls 2 mL of media with penstrep to 6wp backup
Continue to feed every 2-3 days until 90-100% confluent
Clean and sterilize hood with 70% ethanol and turn on UV
Update cell culture notes in lab notebook
Add 30 mls 30 mL of media with penstrep to T150 flask
creator: Andrea Argouarch
